## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-06-15 — do not edit manually*

### File Paths / Large Files
*~800 tokens/session saved*
- Known large files (read selectively with offset/limit): `src/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx` (18KB), `src/lib/demo-data.ts` (12KB), `src/app/(app)/internal-links/page.tsx` (12KB), `src/app/page.tsx` (10KB)

### Environment / Node Scripts
*~400 tokens/session saved*
- `ws` (WebSocket) module only exists in `~/openclaw/node_modules`, not project deps. All inline node scripts using `require('ws')` must run as `cd ~/openclaw && node << 'EOF' ...`

### Git / Setup
*~250 tokens/session saved*
- Project dir `/Users/iandodge/Documents/ai-quick-seo` already exists as a git repo — `git clone` to it will fail with exit 128. Use `git pull origin main` for updates instead.
